Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xB332 "ESCAPEFROMPARADISE-0400-B332" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Escape from Paradise.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Add an init routine at $0400 which sets the CIA#1 Timer B ($DC06/07) to $06/$00 to allow the game to run correctly.
